Day 3 — Child’s Pose (Balasana)
This is a deeply calming posture that allows your body and mind to relax, release tension, and return to a peaceful state. Balasana is your gentle pause in the yoga journey.

✨ Benefits:

Gently stretches the hips, thighs, and lower back

Calms the nervous system

Reduces stress and fatigue

Promotes deep relaxation and emotional balance

🪷 As you fold forward and rest your forehead on the mat, surrender every worry. Feel safe, supported, and completely at ease with your breath guiding you inward.

🔥 Sometimes the strongest thing you can do is rest, reset, and reconnect.

✨ Take this moment for yourself — slow down, breathe, and simply be.

O facto do Dia Internacional do Yoga ter sido escolhido para ser celebrado no Solstício de Verão (no Hemisfério Norte) não e uma coincidência. Trata-se de um momento de pico de luz, que simboliza expansão, vitalidade e despertar. 

Segundo a tradição yogui, este período marca uma transição sagrada no movimento das energias na natureza. Após o Solstício de Verão, o sol inicia a sua viagem para sul (Dakshinayana), um momento especialmente favorável para as práticas interiores, a contemplação e a realização espiritual.

O sol exterior torna-se um símbolo do sol interior; e o solstício recorda-nos que, tal como o sol ilumina o mundo, a consciência ilumina a experiência humana.

O Dia Internacional do Yoga representa também o reconhecimento de que qualquer tipo de experiência acontece dentro de nós, e convida-nos a reflectir sobre a nossa interconectividade com tudo o que existe.

✨ PŘEDSTAVUJEME LEKTORY A LEKCE FESTIVALU JÓGA A MÚZY ✨

Zvuky, které zpomalí čas, a pohyb, který vypráví beze slov. 💫

Odpoledne festivalový prostor rozezní magické tóny handpanu v podání Honzy Macha. Jemné vibrace, rytmus a melodie vytvoří atmosféru, ve které se můžete na chvíli zastavit, nadechnout a jen vnímat přítomný okamžik. ✨

Hudební vystoupení opět pohybově (akrojógově) doprovodí Pavel a Martina Klausovi @acropam, kteří skrze ladnost, důvěru a vzájemnou souhru promění hudbu v živý obraz plný lehkosti a harmonie. 🌿

Čeká nás propojení hudby, pohybu a atmosféry, která se nedá úplně popsat — jen prožít. 🤍

#jogaamuzy #oblastnimuzeummost #mestomost #internationalyogaday #joga

Your mind hasn’t been the problem.

It’s been the most overstimulated, under rested thing in your body, running on everyone else’s noise, leaving no room for your own thoughts to settle. 

Pratyahara is where we start. 🤍

Not with more effort but with less input.

Let’s aim for 15 minutes a day this week with no phone, no noise. Step outside without your phone. Let your mind wander without feeding it anything.

This is Week 1 of a 5-week series leading up to International Yoga Day, one breath and one asana at a time.

Something quieter is coming. 🌿

#Overthinking #Pratyahara #NervousSystemYoga #yogaformentalhealth #InternationalYogaDay

🕉️ JOURNÉE INTERNATIONALE DU YOGA – ÉDITION ÎLE SAINT-HONORAT 🕉️

Comme chaque année, j’ai le plaisir de vous proposer une pratique traditionnelle dans un cadre exceptionnel… entre mer, silence et nature préservée 

SAMEDI 27 JUIN – SE RELIER À L’ESSENTIEL

À l’occasion de la Journée Internationale du Yoga, offrez-vous une parenthèse hors du temps, une invitation à ralentir, respirer et vous reconnecter à votre nature profonde… dans l’harmonie du corps, du cœur et de l’esprit.

Créée par les Nations Unies, la Journée Internationale du Yoga est célébrée chaque année à travers le monde afin de mettre à l’honneur cette pratique ancestrale qui favorise équilibre, conscience, paix intérieure et santé globale.

Au programme :
Des pratiques accessibles à tous, adaptées selon vos besoins, dans un environnement ressourçant entre ciel, mer et pinède.

Départ : 10h – gare maritime/Retour libre : 16h30 ou 17h30

À prévoir :
*Votre pique-nique
*De l’eau
* Un tapis
*Une serviette
*Votre billet de transport

Réservation par SMS au plus tard 1 semaine avant. Tarif : 50 €

En cas de mauvaise météo, la journée sera reportée.

UNE PARENTHÈSE HORS DU TEMPS POUR CÉLÉBRER ENSEMBLE…
LE YOGA… ET LA VIE

Day 2 — Downward-Facing Dog (Adho Mukha Svanasana)

A powerful full-body pose that brings strength, flexibility, and calm energy together. This posture helps you release tension while building stability from within.

✨ Benefits:

Stretches the hamstrings and calves deeply.

Strengthens the arms, shoulders, and upper body.

Improves blood circulation and energy flow.

Relieves stress and calms the mind.

🪷 As you lift your hips and lengthen your spine, feel your body open and your mind soften. Let go of heaviness and allow your breath to guide your movement.

🔥 Every stretch is a step toward becoming stronger, calmer, and more balanced.

✨ Stay consistent. Stay connected. Yoga is not about perfection — it’s about progress.

Большинство людей использует для дыхания лишь часть объема легких. Они дышат поверхностно, задействуя лишь малую часть груд-ной клетки. Их плечи сгорблены, они ощущают болезненное давление в верхней части спины и шеи, страдают от нехватки кислорода. Эти люди быстро утомляются, сами не зная почему.

Что сейчас нужно несчастному большинству из нас это дыхательные приемы, которые могут помочь нам за столом, у печи или у станка. От напряжения и даже от депрессии можно избавиться с помощью диафрагменного дыхания.

Важнейшее преимущество правильного дыхания это концентрация Праны, или нервной энергии, которая повышает уровень жизненной энергии человека. Контроль над праной ведет к контролю над разумом.

Quase 15 anos atrás eu me coloquei pela primeira vez na frente de um grupo e disse: 
Inspire lento e profundo. Expire devagar. 

Desde então, muitas pessoas já foram guiadas por mim numa prática de Yoga. Mais de 400 passaram pelos tapetes do Jyotir. Adultos de todas as idades, todos os corpos, todas as histórias. 

Muitas chegaram me dizendo que eram agitadas demais para o Yoga. Que não conseguiam ficar paradas. Que aquilo provavelmente não era pra elas.
E no final da aula, essas mesmas pessoas me diziam:
"Não imaginava que no Yoga se fazia tanto e que era tão bom." 

É isso que me move até hoje. 

No dia 27/06/26, em parceria com a @trackfieldbetim, apoio de @anturiosbotanica @dralucianapediatra @contareconsultoriacontabil  @moradadosoloficial vou guiar uma prática para 50 pessoas. Uma aula acessível, de verdade — para o corpo que você tem, não para o corpo que você acha que deveria ter. 

Após a prática um brunch e ativação de marcas, produtos, serviços, para quem quiser levar o bem-estar para a sua vida. 

Se você nunca pisou num tapete, esse é o seu convite. 🌿 

Siga o perfil para você não ficar de fora dessa aula.

Большинство людей использует для дыхания лишь часть объема легких. Они дышат поверхностно, задействуя лишь малую часть груд-ной клетки. Их плечи сгорблены, они ощущают болезненное давление в верхней части спины и шеи, страдают от нехватки кислорода. Эти люди быстро утомляются, сами не зная почему.

Что сейчас нужно несчастному большинству из нас это дыхательные приемы, которые могут помочь нам за столом, у печи или у станка. От напряжения и даже от депрессии можно избавиться с помощью диафрагменного дыхания.

Важнейшее преимущество правильного дыхания это концентрация Праны, или нервной энергии, которая повышает уровень жизненной энергии человека. Контроль над праной ведет к контролю над разумом.

科学的根拠に基づくアーユルヴェーダ体質（プラクリティ）とホリスティックウェルネス

アーユルヴェーダの根幹には、個人の不変の体質（プラクリティ）を「ヴァータ」「ピッタ」「カパ」の3つに分類する独自の遺伝生理学があります。これは単なる東洋の神秘ではなく、現代の「アーユルゲノミクス（アーユルヴェーダ遺伝学）」研究により、遺伝子や代謝、分子レベルの指標と密接に一致することが科学的に立証されています。

研究では、特定の遺伝子発現や代謝速度、炎症経路がこれらの体質分類と直接リンクしていることが判明しています。例えば、ピッタ体質は酸化ストレスに関連する遺伝子発現が高く、カパ体質は脂質代謝の遅さに関連する遺伝子マーカーを持ちます。現在では、機械学習によって身体的特徴から体質を正確に予測できるようになり、科学的根拠に基づいた「個別化医療」やオーダーメイドの予防医学として注目を集めています。

Evidence Based Ayurveda Prakriti for Holistic Wellness
The science behind Ayurveda centers on Prakriti (individual body constitution), categorized into three types: Vata, Pitta, and Kapha. Far from mystical, modern research in Ayurgenomics proves these profiles correspond directly to distinct genetic, metabolic, and molecular markers.

Studies show that specific gene expressions, metabolic rates, and inflammation pathways match these traditional categories. For example, individuals with a Pitta profile possess higher baseline expression of oxidative stress genes, while Kapha types display markers linked to slower lipid metabolism. Machine learning models can now accurately predict a person's Prakriti using physical traits, allowing modern medicine to provide personalized prevention and highly tailored treatments.

At Boheme we believe the postures are not simply shapes we make with the body.

They are invitations to study ourselves.

Each time we arrive on the mat we are offered the opportunity to listen within, to observe sensation + to become aware of the subtle patterns of effort, resistance, or ease that live within us.

This is the essence of svadhyaya, the yogic practice of self-study.

Through asana we begin to recognise the quiet wisdom of the body.
How it asks for grounding on some days,
softness on others,
strength when we feel ready to meet it.

When we practice this way, the poses are no longer something we try to perfect.

They become a conversation.

A gentle remembering that the body already carries an intelligence of its own.

Yoga simply gives us the space to return to it.
.

.

Jairampur Battalion of Assam Rifles, as part of the 100 Days Countdown Campaign for the 12th International Day of Yoga 2026, conducted a yoga session at POB Pangsau Pass along the Indo-Myanmar border on 22 May 2026.

✨ IDY 2025 ✨
🕊️ Awareness of Yoga 🕊️

Where Yoga is shared as lived wisdom, guiding reflection, balance, and mindful living.

What happens when different prayers meet in one shared breath?

On June 21, 2025, I had the honour of being invited to lead the International Day of Yoga session at the Chunakkara Mar Baselios Gregorios Orthodox Christian Youth Movement, Nooranad.
@johnmathewliju

The gathering reflected unity in diversity — where spiritual traditions and Yogic wisdom met in mutual respect and harmony.

A tree plantation was also undertaken as part of the “My Tree” initiative by The Satsang Foundation, Thiruvananthapuram, and Babaji Temple, Nooranad, reminding us that Yoga is not philosophy alone — but responsibility in action.

🪷 Essence
International Day of Yoga is a celebration of integration — beyond boundaries of culture, faith, or institution.
When practiced with sincerity, Yoga becomes a bridge: 
• Uniting body and breath
• Integrating discipline with devotion
• Connecting self-awareness with service
• Creating harmony across traditions

🌸 Impact
• Encourages inner balance and emotional steadiness
• Inspires youth toward mindful and value-based living
• Strengthens physical, mental, and social well-being
• Promotes harmony across communities
• Nurtures ecological responsibility through conscious action

When introduced thoughtfully, Yoga becomes not an external addition — but an inner anchor.

💡 Reflection & Gratitude
With reverence to the Guru Parampara and heartfelt gratitude to Rev. Fr. Shiji Koshy, the parish leadership, Youth Movement office bearers @lijujohnmathew, and all organisers for their trust and openness.

Moments like these reaffirm a simple truth:

Yoga does not belong to a place.
It belongs to awareness.
And awareness flourishes wherever humility and shared intention exist.

May the light of Yoga awaken clarity in thought, compassion in action, and peace in every heart.

🌎 Lokāḥ Samastāḥ Sukhino Bhavantu 🤍

Different prayers. One breath. One humanity.

✨ IDY 2025 ✨
🕊️ Awareness of Yoga 🕊️

Where Yoga is shared as lived wisdom, guiding reflection, balance, and mindful living.

As part of the International Day of Yoga celebrations, I had the privilege of being invited to deliver a talk on June 19, 2025, at National Institute of Technology Calicut.
The session explored Yoga as a holistic way of life — and its practical relevance in our daily routines.

Ancient yogic wisdom is not distant philosophy; it is a living framework guiding us toward physical health, mental harmony, and inner balance.

🪷 Essence
Yoga extends far beyond physical postures (āsana). It refines awareness, steadies the mind, and deepens our relationship with life itself. A key reflection shared was on nairantarya abhyāsa — consistent, uninterrupted practice. There are no shortcuts to Yoga’s transformative potential.

If we cannot spare even five minutes a day for self-alignment, it gently invites a deeper question:

What quality of life are we truly pursuing?

🌸 Impact
• Strengthens physical vitality
• Cultivates mental clarity and emotional steadiness
• Encourages disciplined and mindful living
• Nurtures collective harmony
• Inspires responsibility toward planetary wellbeing

When understood correctly, Yoga becomes not an escape from modern life — but a method to live it more consciously.

💡 Reflection & Gratitude
With reverence to the Guru Parampara, I remain deeply thankful to The Satsang Foundation, Thiruvananthapuram, and International Yoga Research Foundation for their continued inspiration, and to NIT Calicut for this meaningful opportunity.
May awareness translate into practice.
May practice mature into transformation.
May transformation contribute to collective wellbeing.

🌎 Lokāḥ Samastāḥ Sukhino Bhavantu 🤍

#InternationalDayOfYoga2025 #IDY2025 #YogaAwareness #YogaInEducation #ConsciousLiving

✨ IDY 2025 ✨
🕊️ Awareness of Yoga 🕊️

Where Yoga is shared as lived wisdom, guiding reflection, balance, and mindful living.

What if Yoga in schools is not just a celebration — but a developmental framework?

On June 21, 2025, I had the privilege of conducting the International Day of Yoga session at CBM Higher Secondary School, Nooranad.

The session was inaugurated by the Sub Inspector of Police, Nooranad — a presence that reinforced the importance of collective wellbeing across institutions.
As part of the “My Tree” initiative by The Satsang Foundation and Babaji Temple, Nooranad, a tree plantation drive was also undertaken — reminding us that Yoga extends beyond the mat into responsibility toward nature and society.

🪷 Essence
International Day of Yoga is a collective pause — an invitation to move from restlessness to steadiness, from complexity to clarity. When practiced sincerely, Yoga evolves from posture into presence, and from technique into a way of living.
In educational spaces, Yoga becomes more than physical exercise. It becomes a structured tool for holistic development.

🌸 Impact
For students, it supports:
• Emotional regulation and behavioural balance
• Cognitive clarity and improved concentration
• Resilience under academic and social pressures
• Ethical sensitivity and self-discipline

For institutions, it contributes to:
• A calmer, focused learning environment
• Healthier classroom dynamics
• A long-term culture of wellbeing
• Value-based leadership development
Yoga, when integrated with intention, strengthens not only bodies — but educational ecosystems.

💡 Reflection
With gratitude to the Guru Parampara and the institution for this meaningful opportunity, I remain thankful to share Yoga in a space of learning. True awareness spreads not through force, but through quiet presence.

May the light of Yoga awaken clarity in thought, compassion in action, and steadiness in heart.

🌎 Lokāḥ Samastāḥ Sukhino Bhavantu 🤍

Prática yoga hormonal

Em alguns dos asanas seguintes utilizamos bastrika pranayama na permanência, mula bandha e kechari mudra. Fazemos um exercício de imaginação, em que a energia gerada no pranayama, percorre regiões específicas, responsáveis pelo equilíbrio hormonal.
Sequência:
Surya Namaskar
Posturas: 
1- Sukhasana (postura fácil)
2-Supta Baddha Konasana – Postura do Ângulo Fechado Supino
3- Bhujangasana – Postura da Cobra
 - Dandasana - postura do bastão 
4-Makarasana - postura do crocodilo
5-Janu Sirsasana – Cabeça no Joelho
6- Malasana - postura da guirlanda
7- Viparita Karani – Postura das Pernas na Parede (variação)
8- Savasana (postura de relaxamento)

Fibromialgia e a prática de yoga.

Os melhores resultados alcançados no tratamento da fibromialgia ocorreram quando foram combinadas diferentes abordagens terapêuticas, em vez de usar apenas um tipo de intervenção isolada.

Exercícios + Treinamento de habilidades de enfrentamento
Ex: a pessoa faz Hatha Yoga para melhorar a flexibilidade e reduzir a dor. Além disso, aprende técnicas de respiração e meditação para lidar melhor com o estresse e a fadiga.

*Comentários anedóticos referem-se a relatos ou observações individuais dos participantes, que não foram coletados por meio de métodos sistemáticos ou padronizados. Eles são baseados na experiência pessoal e na percepção subjetiva de cada pessoa.

*A tradução para “Yoga for Awareness” pode ser entendida como yoga que enfatiza o desenvolvimento da consciência em um sentido amplo, incluindo corpo, mente e espírito. Ou yoga que aproxima-se da ideia de mindfulness, presença no momento presente

Samyoga Symposium: Integrating Yoga with Cancer Care  was conducted as Part of Yoga Sangamam on June 18th & 21st, 2025. HCG Cancer Centre, Bengaluru hosted the international day of yoga celebrations with the support of CCRYN, bringing together oncologists, yoga experts, and healthcare professionals to explore the evidence-based role of yoga in cancer care.

The event, attended by distinguished guests including Dr. BS Ajaikumar, Dr. Raghavendra Rao, Prof. Dr. Ramesh Billimagga, Dr. Radheshyam Naik, Dr KS Gopinath, Dr Vishal Rao, Dr. Brinda Sitaram, Dr Shruti Kohli, and Mr. Arnab Hazra, highlighted yoga's potential in enhancing patient resilience and quality of life.

This initiative reflected HCG’s commitment to holistic wellness and the global vision of One Health. This is a testament to HCGs commitment to holistic care.

ఈ కార్యక్రమంలో భాగంగా దాదాపు 50 మంది సభ్యులతో సామూహికంగా సూర్య నమస్కారాలు చేయించడం జరిగింది. ప్రజల్లో ఆరోగ్యంపై అవగాహన కల్పించడం, యోగాను దైనందిన జీవితంలో భాగం చేసుకోవాలనే ఉద్దేశంతో ఈ కార్యక్రమం చేపట్టడం జరిగిందని నిర్వాహకులు తెలిపారు.

ప్రతిరోజూ సూర్య నమస్కారాలు చేయడం వలన శారీరక దృఢత్వం, మానసిక ప్రశాంతత చేకూరుతుందని, అందరూ యోగాను అలవర్చుకోవాలని ఈ సందర్భంగా పిలుపునిచ్చారు. పాల్గొన్న వారందరికీ పద్మశాలి సంఘం తరపున ధన్యవాదాలు తెలియజేశారు.#Ayush #IDY2026 #YogaForHumanity #SuryaNamaskar #GuinnessWorldRecord SuryanamaskarForHealth Siricilla Telangana MoAyush InternationalDayOfYoga @narendramodi @ministryofayush

Balasana (posturadelniño)🤍 :
Ése rincón de inocencia, seguridad y confianza total, donde no hay nada que demostrar, sólo rendirse amorosamente a lo que es, para que el momento presente nos abrace fuerte 🫂

🧘🏼‍♀️​A veces, la práctica de yoga más avanzada no es la que requiere más fuerza física, sino la que nos pide la valentía de parar.

​En la Postura del Niño, volvemos a la raíz, al latido interno. Al apoyar la frente en la tierra, calmamos la mente y permitimos que el sistema nervioso se restaure. Es un recordatorio de que siempre podemos volver a casa, a ese lugar seguro de paz que ya habita en nosotros✨️
​
Hoy permitite un instante de rendición amorosa 🙏🌻

​#yogaathome #asana #yogalife #mindfulness #prana

Jairampur Battalion of Assam Rifles, as part of the 100 Days Countdown Campaign for the 12th International Day of Yoga 2026, conducted a yoga session at POB Pangsau Pass along the Indo-Myanmar border on 22 May 2026.

Members of the Indian People’s Forum Dubai chapter gathered at the iconic Dubai Frame to perform yoga asanas as part of the countdown to International Day of Yoga 2026. The event celebrated yoga’s role in promoting physical health, mental strength and inner harmony.

Held against one of Dubai’s most recognised landmarks, the session reflected the growing enthusiasm of the Indian community in the UAE for yoga and wellness practices. Participants described the venue as a symbolic connection between India’s ancient tradition of holistic well-being and the UAE’s modern, progressive vision.

The event also carried a strong message of unity and global wellness ahead of International Day of Yoga on June 21. This year marks the twelfth global edition of the celebration, themed “Yoga for Wellness, Wisdom, and World Peace.”

Organisers said the gathering highlights how yoga continues to inspire communities worldwide, fostering peace, mindfulness and healthier lifestyles across cultures.

🌿 क्या आपका लिवर लगातार ओवरलोड हो रहा है? जानिए इसे प्राकृतिक रूप से डिटॉक्स करने के अचूक तरीके! 🚨
आज की भागदौड़ भरी जिंदगी, तनाव और अनहेल्दी खान-पान हमारे शरीर के सबसे महत्वपूर्ण अंग—लिवर (Liver)—पर भारी पड़ रहे हैं। लिवर हमारे शरीर का मुख्य फिल्टर है जो सभी विषाक्त पदार्थों (Toxins) को बाहर निकालता है। जब यह थक जाता है, तो शरीर बीमारियों का घर बन जाता है।
लेकिन घबराएं नहीं! प्राकृतिक चिकित्सा और योग में इसका स्थायी समाधान है। 
🔹 जादुई योगासन: 'हस्तपाद चालनासन' आपके पाचन तंत्र और लिवर की गहरी मालिश करता है, जबकि 'शवासन' तनाव कम करके लिवर की सेल्फ-हीलिंग प्रक्रिया को तेज करता है। 
🔹 सात्विक आहार: चुकंदर, पपीता, नींबू-पानी और ताज़ा सलाद आपके लिवर के सबसे अच्छे दोस्त हैं।
विशेष 7-दिवसीय डिटॉक्स प्लान: हमने आपके लिए एक बेहद आसान और कारगर 7-दिन का लिवर डिटॉक्स डाइट प्लान तैयार किया है। इसे फॉलो करके आप सिर्फ एक हफ्ते में हल्कापन और ऊर्जा महसूस करेंगे।
👉 पूरा डाइट प्लान और योगासनों की सही विधि जानने के लिए हमारे Facebook पर विस्तृत लेख पढ़ें। [https://www.facebook.com/bschauhan09]
🙏 अपील: खराब जीवनशैली आज हर घर की समस्या है। कृपया इस महत्वपूर्ण जानकारी को अपने परिवार, दोस्तों और व्हाट्सएप ग्रुप्स में शेयर (Share) जरूर करें, ताकि हर कोई स्वस्थ रह सके!
